name: polymath-connector-launchdarkly
description: LaunchDarkly connector: MCP for flag list/get/update + Stop hook reminding flag-check at end of turn when the diff touches code behind a flag.

launchdarklyApiKey.title: LaunchDarkly API access token
launchdarklyApiKey.description: Service token from LaunchDarkly Account settings → Authorization. Read-only for triage; writer for flag updates.

launchdarklyProject.title: LaunchDarkly project key
launchdarklyProject.description: Default project key (e.g. "default" or your project slug).
